item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-044","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答直接列出适合6岁孩子的巴黎博物馆，并给出简短理由和优先推荐；没有进行方法论化的 framing 分析或不必要的流程展开。符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep/direct answer 预期。"}
